name: Persona
author: Oikos
description: Card persona HA: avatar, zona, batteria, passi/km guidati. Layout split con mappa Google Maps live sul lato destro (sfumatura graduale tra info e mappa), campo dedicato per il device_tracker GPS, badge LIVE animato.
description_en: HA person card: avatar, zone, battery, steps/driven km. Split layout with live Google Maps on the right (gradient between info and map), dedicated GPS device_tracker field, animated LIVE badge.
description_de: HA-Personenkarte: Avatar, Zone, Akku, Schritte/gefahrene km. Geteiltes Layout mit Google Maps live (rechts), dediziertes GPS-device_tracker-Feld, animiertes LIVE-Abzeichen.
description_es: Tarjeta de persona HA: avatar, zona, batería, pasos/km recorridos. Diseño dividido con Google Maps en vivo (derecha), campo GPS device_tracker dedicado, badge LIVE animado.
description_fr: Carte personne HA : avatar, zone, batterie, pas/km parcourus. Mise en page divisée avec Google Maps en direct (droite), champ GPS device_tracker dédié, badge LIVE animé.
